rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it "extends contagion findings" and frames its gap against prior contagion work on direct contact, which directly matches the cited paper’s core contribution on product contagion via perceived/physical contact with disgusting products. The construct and mechanism overlap is strong (contamination beliefs, disgust/contact cues, cognitive-load evidence), so this is plausibly a foundational theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention.
